toolbar.clipboardToast: Use the in-session toolbar for clipboard sync
toolbar.uploadToast: Drag files onto the stream, or use the in-session toolbar
toolbar.audioToast: Audio is bridged via the PulseAudio sidecar
toolbar.printToastDescription: Print to the CUPS sidecar; jobs are captured as PDF for download.
toolbar.webcamWebRtcNote: Neko handles camera/mic natively — it is forwarded into the session via WebRTC.
toolbar.webcamKasmNote: For KasmVNC: add /dev/video0 to workspace dockerConfig.devices to pass the device into the container.
toolbar.deviceToastDescription: Add device paths (e.g. /dev/video0, /dev/bus/usb, /dev/pcsc) to the workspace dockerConfig.devices array to forward hardware into the session container.
toolbar.shareNeedsLiveDescription: Run with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_MODE=live to generate a real invite link.
toolbar.dropToUpload: Drop files to upload to the session
toolbar.filesQueued: {count, plural, one {# file queued for upload} other {# files queued for upload}}
toolbar.filesQueuedDescription: Files are delivered to the session via the in-stream file channel.

status.pausedDescription: Compute is frozen — your state is retained.
status.pausedToastDescription: Compute is frozen; state is retained.
status.disconnectedDescription: The stream for {name} is no longer available. It may have been terminated or timed out.
status.placeholderDescription: No stream endpoint is configured, so this is a placeholder. To embed the real {name} client here, run a KasmVNC container and point the viewer at it:
status.noStreamTitle: Session is running in demo mode
status.noStreamDescription: No stream endpoint is configured. To embed the real {name} stream here, start a KasmVNC container and point the viewer at it:
status.noStreamSetupHint: or set NEXT_PUBLIC_DEMO_STREAM_URL in docker-compose to use an existing container.
status.unreachableDescription: Your browser can't resolve {host}. The workspace stream URL isn't reachable from here — ask your administrator to set a public workspace URL (WORKSPACE_PUBLIC_BASE_URL or the zone's proxy base URL).
status.launchTimeoutDescription: {name} hasn't finished starting. This can happen on a slow image pull or a weak connection. You can retry or go back.

dlp.clipboardDisabledHint: Clipboard sync is disabled by the workspace DLP policy.
dlp.uploadsDisabledHint: File uploads are disabled by the workspace DLP policy.
dlp.audioDisabledHint: Audio output is disabled by the workspace DLP policy.
dlp.printingDisabledHint: Printing is disabled by the workspace DLP policy.
dlp.uploadsDisabledToastDescription: This workspace blocks file uploads (DLP policy).
